name: fluid-flow
full_name: Fracture-Flow (Flow Knot / Flow Plane) FISH Intrinsics
description: Pointer-based FISH access to 3DEC's fracture-flow network used in hydro-mechanical coupling — flow knots (nodal points) and flow planes (planar fracture-flow elements).

notes: flowknot.pp / flowknot.head are pore pressure and hydraulic head at the knot.
A flow plane couples to the mechanical joint via 'flowplane.contact'.
